summary: Cleaned up menu data definitions around mnsoundtest and mndatadel by splitting previously over-broad data blobs into smaller typed symbols, tightening static header declarations, and adjusting code to use explicit arrays and types. The decomp.dev report showed this completed .data for main/melee/mn/mndatadel and main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest and produced small code-match improvements in several related functions.

key_files.role: Split and retyped data symbols for mnSoundTest and mnDataDel, including Vec3/float/string/2-byte/4-byte objects and local labels.

Reduced MnDataDelData to the fields still represented as a struct, moved adjacent data into standalone static AnimLoopSettings, u32, u16, and Vec3 definitions, and collapsed adjacent user-data bytes into an array.
Updated users of the old aggregate fields to use the newly split symbols and array fields, improving matches across several mndatadel functions.
Added vec_8, adjusted sound test table typing and indexing, fixed input/test code paths, and corrected return typing for mnSoundTest_8024BEE0.
Changed mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 declaration from s32 to HSD_GObjProc* to match the implementation.

what_changed: In symbols.txt, the old broad mnSoundTest_803EF0A8 size 0x6C float object and mnSoundTest_803EF114 size 0x48C object were replaced by smaller symbols including vec_0 through vec_8, text_ids, data_2, data_3, data_4, and several string symbols.

In symbols.txt, the old mnDataDel_803EF870 and large mnDataDel_803EF8AC blobs were split into separate AnimLoopSettings-like float blocks, an index array mnDataDel_803EF8AC, a u16 text-id array mnDataDel_803EF8C8, Vec3 lbl_803EF8D4, and string labels.
MnDataDelData was shrunk to two AnimLoopSettings fields; fields formerly embedded at x18, x24, x30, x3C, x58, and x64-x6C were represented as independent static objects instead.
MnDataDelGObjUserData changed separate byte fields x3 through x8 into u8 x3[6], and mndatadel.c was updated to use x3[index] instead of individual byte members.
mndatadel.c replaced pointer arithmetic and casts into the old aggregate data with direct indexing of mnDataDel_803EF8AC and mnDataDel_803EF8C8.
mndatadel.c converted a do-while pointer-walk over six entries into a clearer for loop and used ARRAY_SIZE in initialization loops where available.
mnsoundtest.c added Vec3 vec_8 and used it for SIS text position values.
mnsoundtest.c changed data_4 from u32[] to s32[] and changed mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 indexing to use data_3[user_data->unk3] followed by data_4[temp_r29_3].
mnsoundtest.c changed an input branch from MenuInput_LTrigger to MenuInput_StartButton.
mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 now returns HSD_GObjProc* instead of s32, with the header updated accordingly.
smart_moves: Splitting data blobs by real boundaries let the symbol map describe floats, vectors, strings, u16 IDs, and u32 index arrays independently instead of forcing unrelated content through one artificial struct.
Leaving only the first two AnimLoopSettings in MnDataDelData avoided overfitting one struct across adjacent but semantically separate data.
Replacing x3/x4/x5/x6/x7/x8 with x3[6] made repeated flag handling express the actual layout and reduced repeated scalar assignments.
Using direct named arrays such as mnDataDel_803EF8AC and mnDataDel_803EF8C8 removed brittle casts like ((u16*) &mnDataDel_803EF870.x58)[idx] and ((s32*) &mnDataDel_803EF870.x3C)[idx].
Correcting mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 to return HSD_GObjProc* preserved the real pointer type instead of round-tripping through s32.
The cleanup produced measurable matching gains while also making the C more idiomatic and maintainable.
decomp_lessons: If a large data symbol contains several adjacent conceptual tables, splitting it in symbols.txt and static headers can improve both data matching and code generation.
Do not force all neighboring .data into one struct solely because it is contiguous; standalone static objects can be a better representation for compiler output and semantic clarity.
Sequential byte fields in user-data structs are strong candidates for fixed-size arrays when code repeatedly indexes or loops over them.
Replacing pointer arithmetic against struct interior offsets with typed arrays often improves match quality and makes future field naming safer.
Function prototypes should reflect actual return values, especially for HSD object/proc pointers; using integer placeholders can hide type information and harm decomp readability.
Small source-level changes such as loop form, cast width, and table signedness can affect matching without changing runtime behavior.
naming_conventions: Temporary split sound-test vector symbols were named vec_0 through vec_8.
Sound-test tables used generic names text_ids, data_2, data_3, and data_4; these are still weak semantic names but better separated than one blob.
Address-based names such as mnDataDel_803EF870, mnDataDel_803EF888, mnDataDel_803EF894, mnDataDel_803EF8A0, mnDataDel_803EF8AC, and mnDataDel_803EF8C8 were retained for mndatadel split data.
Unidentified local strings/vectors around mndatadel used lbl_803EF8D4-style labels.
Local sdata2 constants were represented with @number labels when scope was local, e.g. @8, @156, and @203.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use symbol-map data sizes and types to force correct object boundaries in .data and .sdata2.
Represent animation frame triples as AnimLoopSettings when they are used through start_frame/end_frame fields.
Represent coordinate triples as Vec3 when passed as x/y/z to SIS text creation.
Use explicit u16 arrays for SIS/message IDs instead of reading halfwords out of a larger struct.
Use explicit u32 arrays for joint index tables instead of walking s32 pointers into an aggregate.
Introduce padding and variable ordering where needed in functions such as mnDataDel_8024EA6C to maintain stack/code matching.
Prefer ARRAY_SIZE for loops over fixed arrays when it preserves the same generated code.

review_feedback.feedback: Matched code increased by 280 bytes and matched data increased by 1808 bytes for GALE01.
New complete matches reported: main/melee/mn/mndatadel .data, main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest .data, and mnSoundTest_8024A958.
Unmatched-item improvements included mnDataDel_80250170, fn_8024F840, mnDataDel_8024FE4C, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnDataDel_8024EA6C, fn_8024FD40, fn_8024B2B0, fn_8024ECCC, and fn_8024AED0.
No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename generic mnsoundtest symbols vec_0..vec_8 or data_2/data_3/data_4 to semantic names.
Search for other menu modules with oversized contiguous .data structs that could be split like mnDataDel_803EF870 and mnDataDel_803EF8AC.
Check whether mndatadel string labels lbl_803EF8E0 through lbl_803EFA60 gained semantic names in later work.
Review mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 and fn_8024B2B0 after this PR for remaining table-indexing match issues.
